name: trackit-mcp
description: Connect your AI to BMC Track-It to manage tickets, assignments, and solutions.

trackit_base_url.title: Track-It API Base URL
trackit_base_url.description: Base URL for the Track-It WebAPI, e.g. http://your-server/TrackIt/WebApi (no trailing slash)

trackit_group.title: Track-It Group
trackit_group.description: Your Track-It group name, e.g. HELP DESK (can contain spaces)

trackit_domain.title: Windows Domain (optional)
trackit_domain.description: Your Windows domain name, e.g. CONTOSO. Leave blank if your Track-It installation does not use Windows authentication.

trackit_username.title: Username
trackit_username.description: Your Windows login name (without domain prefix), e.g. jsmith
